notes: Core mechanics partially work but ghosts spawn inside walls/ghost house with broken pathing, maze rendering uses hollow rectangles instead of proper walls making it look nothing like Pac-Man, pellet count may be off due to maze design issues, and the siren plays every frame causing audio spam.

The game has a fragile movement system that relies on floating-point precision to detect tile centers, which can cause entities to clip through walls or get stuck if the frame rate fluctuates; additionally, the audio implementation creates a new oscillator every frame, causing severe audio glitching.

Core movement and pellet collection work, but several Pac-Man essentials are simplified or incorrect, including ghost behavior, respawn/death flow, lives display omission, and rough maze/rendering fidelity.
